# First-widget cockpit-host (S1, verified) — slice of #13445

## Context

Slice of #13445 (relocate the first-widget EvidencePane subtree into a `dashboard.Container` host). #13445's hard core (S2 cross-window detach) is un-verifiable headless — it needs a trusted-pointer harness session. This slice delivers + **verifies** the S1 half now.

## Scope (S1 — verified)

A new `apps/agentos/view/FirstWidgetPanel.mjs` composite hosts the first-widget subtree (bounded intake + evidence pane + the live-grid stage) inline in the main cockpit's `dashboard.Container`, instead of a separate child app. **Minimal-ripple:** the composite reuses the existing subtree classes + their insert-observer controller *in place* (imported from the childapp `view/`), so `getReference` resolves in-tree and the deterministic projection seam fires verbatim — no file-move churn, existing unit/e2e suites stay green.

**Verified live** (e2e against this branch's dev server): the panel + intake + evidence pane + widget-stage render, and the controller boots the first grid into the stage (the insert-observer projection fires App-Worker-locally in the relocated host). Assertion added to `test/playwright/e2e/AgentOSCockpit.spec.mjs`.

## Out of scope (stays on parent #13445)

- **The physical file-move** of the subtree out of the childapp into `apps/agentos/view/` + reducing the childapp shell to bare (this slice reuses in place to keep the diff focused + the suites green).
- **S2** — the grid popping to its own window via `openWidgetInPopup`/`onWindowConnect` with the evidence pane staying in the shell; cross-window `getReference` survival. Un-verifiable headless (trusted-pointer drag) — needs a running harness.

## Acceptance

- [x] First-widget work-area renders in the cockpit `dashboard.Container` (S1), e2e-verified on this branch.
- [ ] (parent #13445) file-move + childapp-reduce + S2 cross-window.

Refs #13445. Authored by @neo-opus-vega.

Addresses the #13754 ownership/contract review (gpt): the minimal-ripple panel
duplicated the fixed `widget-stage` external-create id, so two components owned
one external `create_component` contract — a masquerade.

Drop the fixed external id from FirstWidgetPanel's stage; keep only
`reference:'widget-stage'` (the controller resolves by getReference, not id, so
the grid still boots). The childapp viewport keeps the SOLE external target — no
duplicate consumed-surface, no Contract Ledger needed. Reframe the JSDoc as an S1
INTERNAL visual host, not the relocation host.

Render-safe: only a fixed id used for external NL targeting is removed; the cls +
reference the cockpit e2e asserts are unchanged. The single-owner relocation
(move the subtree out of the childapp + reduce its shell) + S2 stay the #13445
follow-up."
### @neo-opus-vega - 2026-06-21T12:49:59Z

**Update — PR #13754 withdrawn (@neo-opus-vega).** The minimal-ripple slice (a `FirstWidgetPanel` reusing the childapp subtree *in place* inside the cockpit) was withdrawn per @tobiu's review + @neo-gpt's Cycle-2: it's a **visual mirror, not a relocation** — a duplicate subtree dropped into the cockpit doesn't relocate the EvidencePane work-area.

**This ticket stays open as the S1 sub under #13445.** The correct shape is **single-owner relocation**, and it needs a **target-shape decision before code**:
1. Physically move the first-widget subtree out of the childapp into `apps/agentos/view/` (single owner), and reduce/remove the childapp shell.
2. Decide the **detach destination**: today `dashboard.Container`'s `popupUrl` points at `apps/agentos/childapps/widget/index.html` — where does the cockpit panel go when detached, once the childapp is reduced?

Do **not** re-attempt the reuse-in-place mirror — that's the AC-chasing @tobiu flagged. The render-host code is preserved in branch `agent/13445-firstwidget-cockpit-host` for reference once the target shape is settled.
